name: mindflow-product-mapper
description: Analyze documents or code in resumable partitions and author validated MindFlow canvases through the local VS Code extension.

interface.shortDescription: Map documents and code to resumable MindFlow canvases.
interface.longDescription: Adds a partitioned analysis workflow, strict MindFlow authoring skills, and automatic discovery of an active MindFlow VS Code MCP session.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create or resume a MindFlow task, complete partitioned analysis and synthesis, then dry-run and generate the canvas in bounded validated batches.
